pi_items.source: Hardcoded identically in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts

All five layer names explicitly mentioned in task.json description with exact names and specifications. Description states: Layer 'WALLS', Layer 'DUCT-SUPPLY', Layer 'DUCT-DIFFUSER', Layer 'DUCT-RETURN', Layer 'DUCT-LABELS'

Analyzed task description: (1) Walls=4 lines, (2) Main trunk=4 lines, (3) 4 branches=16 lines, (4) 4 diffuser squares=16 lines, (5) 4 X marks=8 lines, (6) Return grille=7 lines, (7) Text labels=2 entities. Total full task=57 entities. Threshold of 35 represents 61.4% of complete task, appropriate for minimum viable completion allowing partial submissions.

privileged_info_summary: The HVAC duct layout task is a synthetic CAD task where an agent creates geometry in LibreCAD starting from a blank drawing. The output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/hvac_duct_layout.dxf. The DXF file must contain five specific layers (WALLS, DUCT-SUPPLY, DUCT-DIFFUSER, DUCT-RETURN, DUCT-LABELS) with a minimum of 35 geometric entities combined. The complete task requires approximately 57 entities total: walls rectangle (4), main supply trunk (4), four branch ducts (16), four diffuser squares with X marks (24), return grille with interior lines (7), and text labels (2). The metadata thresholds allow for partial submissions while ensuring substantial completion.
